title: strelitziaceae
intro: The rank Strelitziaceae refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomic grouping that consists of a small number of closely related genera, typically characterized by unique characteristics such as distinctive inflorescences and often, brightly colored flowers. Strelitziaceae is a relatively small family, comprising only a few genera, and is native to tropical regions of Africa and Madagascar. Examples of plants within this family include the Bird of Paradise flower (Strelitzia reginae) and the Crane Flower (Strelitzia nicolai).
